items.quote: Shubs has a way of connecting clinical thinking to product decisions… He'd shipped clinical AI at scale, led the teams, dealt with the tradeoffs. That credibility came through in every session. More importantly, the frameworks he introduced are still in use, still shaping how we think about quality and clinical impact. He was a real trusted partner and a genuinely brilliant collaborator.
items.name: Product Leader
items.rating: Rated 5/5 · Value delivered, professionalism, clarity, quality

items.quote: Shubs helped shape a clear narrative drawing on first-hand experience and real-world implementation, one that we can take away into our discussions with researchers, policy makers, and other funders and that will inform our investment strategy going forwards.
items.name: Guy Parsons

items.quote: Shubs always brings a huge amount of positive energy and enthusiasm to his work, is a strong connector and collaborator, a creative thinker, and a wonderful culture contributor.
items.name: Dr Claire Novorol

items.quote: Shubs helped us bring clarity and focus to both our value messaging and evidence generation strategy. We highly recommend working with Shubs.
items.name: CEO
